title: New feature: View the full contents of a "notify automation" from the notifications panel 🔔

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Introducing the ability to view the full contents of a “notify automation” from the notification panel

In the past, when adding large amounts of text to a notification automation, only a small portion of the notification was visible via the notification pane, meaning parts of the message were easily missed and/or overlooked. Now, with the addition of the read more option , you can now view the whole notification message from the notification panel without missing those crucial details!

https://global.discourse-cdn.com/monday/original/3X/e/8/e8923f90cc01fb5050b366244fd47f39586016a3.mov

This improvement is one we have been waiting for, so we’d love to hear if this is a welcomed update for our community, too?!
